message:
fix(hash-correctness): strengthen content hashes to cover all semantically significant fields

Several content hash computations were omitting fields that are part of
the semantic identity of the object:

- cold_start_aot_governance: sort evidence_hashes and parity_hashes in
  DecisionReceipt before feeding for order-independent hash
- contextual_policy_selector: include selected_kind in SelectionDecision
  hash when present
- counterfactual_replay_engine: include regimes appearing only on the
  counterfactual side in regime_breakdown computation
- disruption_scorecard: include floor_millionths, target_millionths,
  meets_target per dimension, targets_met overall, and
  environment_fingerprint in ScorecardResult fingerprint
- phase_gate: include all metric key-value pairs in GateReport hash
- tail_latency_feedback_control: cover proportional, integral, and
  derivative PID terms in ControlDecision hash (not just raw_output)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
